question: Create Sequential: Linear(10,5)->ReLU->Linear(5,2). Count children() vs modules().
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

model = nn.Sequential(
    nn.Linear(10, 5),
    nn.ReLU(),
    nn.Linear(5, 2)
)
children = list(model.???())
modules = list(model.???())
print(f"children() count: {len(children)}")
print(f"modules() count: {len(modules)}")
